subject: Human Resources
title: Internal Talent Marketplaces
description: A 60-second lesson on Internal Talent Marketplaces.

hook.text: An employee wants to learn data science but their manager won't release them.

buildup.text: Internal talent marketplaces are platforms that match employees to projects, gigs, mentorships, and roles across the organization.

discovery.text: Unilever's FLEX marketplace gives workers access to cross-functional projects—building skills and networks beyond their team.

twist.text: Managers resist since they lose people.

climax.text: Talent marketplaces increase retention, skill diversity, and innovation—making it easier to grow inside than to leave.

punchline.text: If you don't let people move within, they'll move out.

quiz.question: What is the purpose of an internal talent marketplace?
options: To match employees to projects, gigs, and roles across the organization
